label: Layout fill edges parms
description: Parameters for placing things along the interior edges of a room. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Thing
def.description: ThingDef to place along room edges. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material (ThingDef) used when the placed thing is stuffable.

padding.label: Padding
padding.description: Gap in cells between placed edge things.

contractedBy.label: Contracted by
contractedBy.description: How many cells the placement area is contracted inward from the room edge.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Fixed count range override. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from groupsPerTenEdgeCells instead.

groupsPerTenEdgeCells.label: Groups per ten edge cells
groupsPerTenEdgeCells.description: Random range for how many placement groups appear per 10 edge cells.

groupCountRange.label: Group count range
groupCountRange.description: Random range for how many items appear in each placement group.

rotOffset.label: Rotation offset
rotOffset.description: Rotation applied to placed things relative to the wall they face.
